title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 3.040 - Laws to be omitted
text:
3.040.  Laws to be omitted. — No law relating to the bonded indebtedness of the state, no law of incorporation, no law for the appropriation of money, no memorial or joint resolution, no law or part of law of a private, local or temporary nature shall be published in the revised statutes or supplements or pocket parts thereto, but all such laws and provisions not expressly repealed shall continue in force or expire, according to their respective provisions or limitations.
(L. 1949 p. 545 § 3.04, A.L. 1959 S.B. 88)
